channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1095] Console message cleanup
item.description: The console messages from Lustre 2.1 are excessive. This will be a catch-all ticket for commits that I will submit to begin the cleanup.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (green@whamcloud.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/33281/
Subject: LU-1095 misc: quiet console messages at startup
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ed0c19d250f61b923b023e617b1c1323732767fc

Andreas Dilger (adilger@whamcloud.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/33281
Subject: LU-1095 misc: quiet console messages at startup
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 94d801e1abcee5e8856a6ac72450a1b6fd6b649e

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/25586/
Subject: LU-1095 obdclass: improve missing operation message
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: a89dfe097476af90fce3c9d878267bbff1c055c9

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/25399/
Subject: LU-1095 mdt: quiet mdt_mfd_set_mode() debugging
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 98e4251b6e6600a1147dbaeb949a9ae380f4b70e

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/25586
Subject: LU-1095 obdclass: improve missing operation message
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 32fade621ccc7437b76ceccaf22031cae9babfc1

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/25399
Subject: LU-1095 mdt: quiet mdt_mfd_set_mode() debugging
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 3afbb4514f4cb118645a442c8a21fc240f1dd5e8

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/25393
Subject: LU-1095 mdc: quiet mdc_close() debug logging
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 59bb60dddcfb7cb9ad6b9898ceb7ce914a36f2b7

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/17131/
Subject: LU-1095 lod: quiet "wanted N, found M" console message
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ac5a9c8515829c8ed92567256a0a84b00d70040d

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/17078/
Subject: LU-1095 mdc: remove console spew from mdc_ioc_fid2path
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 3cc79c2fb5cdfb8e7a0eef45cf4794923a898493

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/17131
Subject: LU-1095 lod: quiet "wanted N, found M" console message
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: c18469e16c75c1ba2f618c0356c23df10b272faf

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/17078
Subject: LU-1095 mdc: remove console spew from mdc_ioc_fid2path
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: b93e4c8901b811a9b66549cdc51f097bb024c4c6

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/12399/
Subject: LU-1095 llite: improve max_readahead console messages
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 48a0697d79101ad3ff7651779808dcf002a68890

backport of http://review.whamcloud.com/8617 to b2_5:
http://review.whamcloud.com/9261

backport of http://review.whamcloud.com/7918 to b2_5:
http://review.whamcloud.com/9263
http://review.whamcloud.com/6264 for 2.4.0
http://review.whamcloud.com/3996 <-> http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,4116
http://review.whamcloud.com/3994 <-> http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,4115
please do not close this ticket. This is a tracker for continue patches
Please reopen this ticket if there is outstanding work to do.

I'll start porting these to master
http://review.whamcloud.com/3993 <-> http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,4043

I pushed a few patches we're carrying on orion involving console cleanup. My guess is they would apply cleanly to master as well.

http://review.whamcloud.com/3993
http://review.whamcloud.com/3994
http://review.whamcloud.com/3995
http://review.whamcloud.com/3996

I piggy-backed the following patch on this bug to clean up some ptlrpc debug log messages. (I ran across the annoying multi-line log entries while investigating ORI-670.)

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,3547

Let me know if I should open a new bug instead.

I was looking at the console output in:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_logs/dab5dcb8-b87f-11e1-b0dd-52540035b04c

and it appears that the recent commit 389fde827be2ee6fb4ee08e955d773a2a16e70c6 lost a linefeed on one of the console messages. This is fixed in:

http://review.whamcloud.com/3134

Also, another cleanup of annoying console messages (seen during sanity.sh testing):
http://review.whamcloud.com/3130

Integrated in lustre-master » i686,server,el6,ofa #499
LU-1095 debug: CWARN to CDEBUG for mds_notify() event (Revision 4fca2a0c7ec9a447fbaea6eb3411e07225150a0f)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 4fca2a0c7ec9a447fbaea6eb3411e07225150a0f

I think that is just used as the intended location where it will be fixed. Some things were landed there, but this ticket has been ongoing since then and that field as not been updated (I have no control over those fields after ticket creation).

So the answer is that some did land in 2.2, but there are many more that have not yet landed. If you haven't already figured out gerrit's search options, you can search on "message:LU-1095" at review.whamcloud.com to see what is still pending.
I'm confused by what "fix version" means. Is this landed in 2.2?
will do
Ping. Please assign reviewers for the changes listed in the previous two comments. Also, http://review.whamcloud.com/2201 needs a Maloo kick. I think it failed for an unrelated reason.
http://review.whamcloud.com/2249

The following series is a from a set of patches that Brian Behlendorf created two years ago. We pushed them upstream for 1.8, but the never landed. So here is my first pass at porting them forward to master.

New Changes:
http://review.whamcloud.com/2199
http://review.whamcloud.com/2200
http://review.whamcloud.com/2201
http://review.whamcloud.com/2202
http://review.whamcloud.com/2203
http://review.whamcloud.com/2204
http://review.whamcloud.com/2198

Note to myself: look into whether these lines should be removed from the console:

LCONSOLE_INFO("client enabled MDS capability!\n");
LCONSOLE_INFO("client enabled OSS capability!\n");
